Notes: Test how the server handles an UPDATE that adds an A RR at an owner name that already has a CNAME, without first deleting the CNAME.

Steps.Description: Attempt to add an A record at alias.campus.edu., which already owns a CNAME, with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the existing CNAME remains after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: alias.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the added A record was accepted, ignored, or caused the name to be rejected.
